statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); tokens=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context.tokens_loaded // 0'); exceeds=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context.exceeds_200k_tokens // false'); if [ -d "$cwd/.git" ]; then branch=$(cd "$cwd" && git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); git_info=" on ${branch:-unknown}"; else git_info=""; fi; if [ "$tokens" != "0" ] && [ "$tokens" != "null" ]; then tokens_k=$((tokens / 1000)); if [ "$exceeds" = "true" ]; then context_info=" | ${tokens_k}k tokens (!)"; else context_info=" | ${tokens_k}k tokens"; fi; else context_info=""; fi; printf "${dir}${git_info} | ${model}${context_info}"

hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("gh pr create")) then (if (.tool_input.command | test("# checks-passed")) then empty else "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Before creating a PR, run full package checks via Taskfile or project equivalents: task format, task lint, task test, and task check (if available). Fix all issues. Once everything passes, retry with a trailing # checks-passed comment.\"}}" end) else empty end'

jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("git commit")) then "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"POST-COMMIT: If you have not run tests and formatters recently, do so now before continuing (task test, task lint, task format, or project equivalents). Keep commits regular but keep tests green.\"}}" else empty end'

jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("git push|gh pr create")) then "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Launch a background agent (run_in_background: true) to monitor CI. The agent should run gh pr checks every 3 minutes for up to 30 minutes. If a check fails, report back. Do NOT block the main conversation.\"}}" else empty end'
